query: SELECT provider, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND serviceExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_service_link FROM phone_numbers GROUP BY provider ORDER BY total DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT provider, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND serviceExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_service_link FROM phone_numbers GROUP BY provider ORDER BY total DESC;
